rawAssistant: Charm hoops can give you a bit of a boost, but they're mostly just good luck and morale-boosting. That said, road kit charms vials might be worth trying out – they've got some decent salvaging odds attached to 'em. I've seen folks get lucky with those when it comes to scrounging up useful gear on the side of the road.
